name: sn-docs
description: CLI and MCP server for querying docs.servicenow.com

scripts.build:release: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('release',{recursive:true})" && npx esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=release/sn-docs-cli.cjs --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" && npx esbuild src/mcp-server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=release/sn-docs-mcp.cjs --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node"
